# Pinned to keep aarch64 in lockstep with x86/ROCm: the uv resolver used for the
# cuda12_arm lock otherwise settled on older pydantic/pydantic-core than pip-compile
# picks for x86/ROCm. Bump all three lockfiles together when raising this.
pydantic==2.13.4
pynvml
pyodps
pyOpenSSL==24.1.0
# Pinned for cross-platform version parity (see pydantic note above).
regex==2026.6.28

# Aligned with upstream (which the model/tokenizer code targets). The tokenizer
# workarounds in rtp_llm/frontend/tokenizer_factory/tokenizers/* are guarded on
# transformers major>=5. Bump only after regenerating all three lockfiles on a
# Linux x86_64 + Python 3.10 host.
